statement: The isotropy SO(3) representation on SU(3)/SO(3) tangent space is modeled by the real spin-2 representation on traceless symmetric 3x3 matrices.
nu([n]) = sqrt(3/2)(nn^T - I/3), SO(3)-equivariant and even under n -> -n.
The same SO(3) data supplies tangent holonomy and gauge holonomy; the Spin^h lift cancels the spin obstruction diagonally.
For the homogeneous Wu model, the tangent spin-2 SO(3) bundle and gauge SO(3) bundle carry the same w2 class; Spin^h cancels where Spin and Spin^c fail.
The Veronese surface globalizes over the SO(3) isotropy bundle and lands inside the unit tangent-sphere bundle of the 5d geometry.
